summary_en: 2,360,000 shares to be cancelled (1.77% of shares outstanding, corrected from 1.74%). Effective date not disclosed in correction notice.
title_en: (Correction) Notice of Partial Correction to "Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Stock"
translation_en_brief: On 25 May 2026, MIRARTH Holdings issued a correction notice to its 15 May 2026 announcement regarding treasury stock cancellation. The company identified an error in the disclosed percentage of shares outstanding affected by the cancellation. The number of shares to be cancelled remains 2,360,000, but the percentage of issued shares (excluding treasury stock) has been corrected upward from 1.74% to 1.77%. This is a technical amendment to reflect the accurate proportion of the cancellation relative to the company's share capital.
